site.title: Smart Home Guides
site.description: Open-source, community-driven guides for home automation enthusiasts at every level.

fundamentals.title: Fundamentals
fundamentals.description: Start here. Learn the basics of home automation, protocols, and your first setup.

intermediate.title: Intermediate
intermediate.description: Level up with dashboards, automations, MQTT, and voice assistants.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Custom firmware, DIY sensors, local AI, and advanced security.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.description: Searchable reference of smart home terms, protocols, and acronyms.

hero.title: Smart Home for everyone
hero.subtitle: Open-source, community-driven tutorials for home automation
hero.description: From your first smart plug to custom firmware - free guides built by the community, for the community.

categories.heading: Explore by category
